---
title: "CV"
---

## Current position

**Researcher and PhD Student**  
DFKI – German Research Center for Artificial Intelligence, Berlin  
PhD supervised by Prof. Dr.-Ing. Sebastian Möller, TU Berlin / DFKI

## Education

**M.Sc. Cognitive Systems**  
University of Potsdam, Germany

**B.Sc. Computer Science**  
Case Western Reserve University, USA

**Exchange year**  
University of Sheffield, UK

## Selected experience

- DFKI — Researcher / PhD Student
- SAP Machine Learning Research Group — Research Student
- Hasso-Plattner-Institut — Student Research Assistant
- MathWorks — Associate Software Developer
- EveryKey — Lead Windows Developer

## Skills

Python, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers, scikit-learn, FastAPI, Docker, Git, Linux, NLP, data processing, research writing, mentoring.
